accurate.why: accurate high-level account-by-account listing matching the bill

no_hallucinations.why: all accounts listed appear in the bill; 'Cemeterial Expenses of the Army' is correct account name

exceptions_conditions.why: notes general 'requirements and restrictions' at high level; acceptable for this altitude

effective_dates.why: omitting specific dates is acceptable for a high-level summary

correct_entities.why: all DOD/VA/related agency accounts named correctly
